content: Zhicong Huang is an Assistant Professor with the Shien-Ming Wu School of Intelligent Engineering, South China University of Technology, Guangzhou, China. His research interests include Wireless Power Transfer, Servo Motor Control, Energy Router, Smart Grid and so on.
